logo_and_loader.description: Clean serif for the logo fade-in and premium branding moments.

headings.description: Clean, geometric sans-serif for dashboard headers. DO NOT use Inter here.

body.description: Clear legibility for tasks, notes, and finance data.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Zero clutter. Generous spacing with maximum breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: Sidebar on desktop, bottom nav on mobile. Max 2-level depth.

glassmorphism.usage: Dashboard cards, sticky header, floating AI chat button.

motion_and_interactions.loader: Smooth fade-in with logo and serif 'Mind Matters' text, lingering for 1.5s.
motion_and_interactions.interactions: Inline editing everywhere. One-tap primary actions.

components.strategy: Shadcn UI base, stripped of Vercel styling, modified to pure monochrome glass.
components.cards: Glassmorphic surfaces with 8px radius. No generic solid gray backgrounds.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10.
components.badges: Bordered style or extremely subtle bg-white/10, text-white. No colors.

logo.description: Minimalist elegant logo for Mind Matters, clean serif.

background_texture.usage: Global fixed background behind the app, set to extremely low opacity (e.g. opacity-20) and absolute positioning/z-index -1.

testing.attributes: Every interactive element MUST include data-testid='...' (e.g. data-testid='nav-dashboard-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the animated background: Use the background_texture URL with low opacity behind everything to create the 'ocean wave' feel requested.
2. Implement a splash/loader screen first that uses the logo URL and 'Mind Matters' in serif (Cormorant Garamond) before transitioning to the dashboard.

3. Keep the color palette STRICTLY black, white, and grey. Even success/danger states should rely on grayscale contrast, icons, or subtle UI shifts rather than green/red, as per user's 'no accent colors' rule.
4. All components must utilize glassmorphism: use backdrop-blur, bg-white/[0.03], and subtle border-white/10.
5. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions but overwrite their colors/borders to match this pure monochrome aesthetic.
6. Build the floating AI chat button as a glassmorphic element fixed to the bottom right.
7. Ensure inline editing works for tasks and notes seamlessly without opening unnecessary modals.
